description: Get User From Component is a ProtoFlux node that gets the active user of the slot a component is on.

fields.Instance: The IComponent (Any component) to check for an active user.
fields.* ([[Type:User|User]]): The active user of the slot Instance (IComponent) is on, or null if there isn't an active user.

notes.title: Example
notes.text: File:Protoflux_Get_User_From_Component.webp|an example of using Get User From Component to find the active user of a Tool Tip.
